scene.message: Maki's Mom: What...?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Let us explain{nl} from the beginning.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Ah! The dimension{nl} gate is vanishing...!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mom: I understand.{nl} Just wait one moment!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Ma'am...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki's Mom: What is it?{nl} There's no time. Hurry now.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: .........{waitkey}{ret}
